chunks.text: 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI C. P. No. D-3767 of 2023 Date Order with signature of Judge For orders as to maintainability of Petition. 30.09.2025. Syed Sultan Ahmed, Advocate for the Petitioner. M/s. Khursheed Javed, Muhammad Naseer & Ms. Rahmat- un-Nisa, Advocates for KDA. Mr. K. A. Vaswani, Assistant Advocate General Sindh. ------ Learned counsel for the Petitioner states that the purpose of this Petition has been served inasmuch as an Order dated 22.07.2025 has been issued by the Deputy Secretary (Admn), KDA, Establishment Branch-I, Karachi according approval for pensionery benefits amounting to Rs.16,32,615/-. In view thereof, learned counsel for the Petitioner does not press this Petition further, which stands disposed of accordingly. JUDGE JUDGE MUBASHIR
